scripts.dev: npm --workspace @groundx/shared run build && concurrently -n middleware,app -c blue,green "npm --workspace middleware run dev" "npm --workspace app run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace @groundx/shared run build && npm --workspace app run build && npm --workspace middleware run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace @groundx/shared run build && npm run test:alias && npm run test:setup-env && npm run test:deploy && npm --workspace app test && npm --workspace middleware test
